title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Tata Housing

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Tata Housing
jsonLd.description:
Tata Housing has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Housing:
Tata Housing is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Housing!
